buckets.description: Questions about the formation of shadows, predicting their shape, and understanding factors that change their size or position.
Questions testing the understanding of how light travels from a source, reflects off objects, and enters the eye to enable sight.
Questions involving the design or interpretation of experiments, often using light sensors and data, to investigate properties of light and materials.
Questions focusing on the conceptual classification of materials as transparent, translucent, or opaque based on their interaction with light.
